name: transportation_technology_heat_dome_southport_rig_utl
premise: A Transportation Technology response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving transportation technology heat dome southport rig utl. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the press briefing. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as rights vs utility under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Luc Mensah
agents.identity: I am Luc Mensah, accountable for a defensible call in Transportation Technology when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays utility for rights.

agents.name: Soren Berg
agents.identity: I am Soren Berg, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Transportation Technology.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so utility isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of rights.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect utility.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to utility to secure rights under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the press briefing. Evidence is partial. Luc Mensah must decide under rights vs utility. What does Luc Mensah do?
